title: melia azedarach subvar. toosendan
intro: Melia azedarach subvar. toosendan, also known as the Chinese pepper tree or Toosendan tree, is a deciduous tree native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Meliaceae. The Toosendan tree has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant has been found to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of the Toosendan tree include its seeds, bark, and leaves, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
